text.message: It’s not the best 5 6 9 considering the pre and wheat situation

Yeah but it’s better that blue takes that port than what he’s about to take
lol I wouldn’t have taken that
i think u got a bit cute with ur picks
You could’ve built to wheat port
But you let blue get crazy hybrid setup
yeah cuz people love trading in ranked
and im sure u would never have tried to plow
If I had any beef it would be with black
all that complaining about blue and u trade them a city
not really the point im making
Well the point is I don’t mind the city trade offf once he’s been plowed
i'd argue he gets much much more from this city than he does the 11 4
11:4 keeps his game open for settles
city kinda makes that a moot point
Black is ther a chance you get army over blue
